key_items: Bitcoin slips below $74k for the first time since April as on-chain data shows momentum stalling
Bitcoin Price Falls 5.5% in 5 Days to Below 73,000 as Spot ETF Outflows Accelerate
Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
reasoning: Near-term technicals show clear bearish momentum with break below $74k, ETF outflows accelerating, and on-chain data indicating stalled recovery, creating immediate downside pressure. However, macro tailwinds from institutional adoption (Fidelity commentary on de-dollarization, Cardone/Saylor accumulation, SEC crypto task force support) and geopolitical de-risking provide medium-term support floors around $70-72k.
risks: Continued liquidation cascade triggered by US-Iran tensions, major altcoin contagion (SOL 30% OI drop), or hawkish Fed rhetoric could breach $70k support and trigger capitulation toward $64-68k range within 1-7 days.
